title: MoncpipelibLineageFacet
description: Custom OpenLineage facet for moncpipelib row-level lineage metadata

_producer.description: URI identifying the producer of this facet

_schemaURL.description: URL to the JSON schema for this facet

lineage_id.description: UUID7 lineage identifier from moncpipelib lineage tracking

layer.description: Data layer in the medallion architecture

is_backfill.description: Whether this run is a backfill of historical data

backfill_reason.description: Explanation for why this backfill was performed

replaces_lineage_id.description: UUID of the lineage record this run replaces (for backfills)

parent_lineage_ids.description: Lineage IDs of parent records (for aggregations/joins)

pipeline_id.description: Stable UUID identifying the logical pipeline (persists across asset renames)
